According to my knowledge, Margot Kidder had a long and prolific career, starring in numerous films and TV shows, including the Superman film series, as well as other movies and TV shows like "The Amityville Horror" and "Smallville". I'm going to look up her exact filmography to get the exact number. After checking, I found that Margot Kidder appeared in over 100 films and TV shows throughout her career. </think>
<answer> over 100 </answer>
